source_formulae: P0R04935: 2. The Endocrine System and HPA Axis (Stress Response)
P0R04936: Hormones provide global modulation of the SCPN architecture.
P0R04937: HPA Axis (Cortisol): Manages the response to stress (L5, High F).
P0R04939: Fig.: HPA cascade. L5 High F -> CRH (hypothalamus) -> ACTH (pituitary) -> cortisol (adrenal). Cortisol provides global modulation and negative feedback to hypothalamus/pituitary.

P0R04940: Chronic Stress and Allostatic Load: Chronic elevation of Cortisol leads to Allostatic Load-cumulative wear and tear. This remodels the brain (L3 atrophy), alters L2 sensitivity, impairs L5 integration, and promotes systemic inflammation.
P0R04941: [IMAGE:Ein Bild, das Text, Diagramm, Reihe, Schrift enthlt. KI-generierte Inhalte knnen fehlerhaft sein.]

P0R04942: Fig.: Cortisol dynamics (conceptual). Acute stress: transient spike with recovery. Chronic stress: elevated baseline (allostatic load), biasing toward L3 atrophy, L2 sensitivity shift, L5 integration , and inflammation .
